calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that Mr. Matson is representing himself as the Administrator of this estate, that he has failed to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes and provide a way for the Examiner to communicate with him, and that he has failed to carry this forward at this point. The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar given Mr. Matson's failure to do what is necessary to move this forward and failure to appear today.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jul-03-2019 Continued To Jul-31-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
